mission.title: sops: Release 3.12.0
mission.description:
I wrote the changelog assuming that #2071 gets merged. If it isn't, or if it's adjusted, the changelog needs to be adjusted accordingly.

The release process is described here: https://github.com/getsops/sops/blob/main/docs/release.md#preparation

Closes #2064
Closes #2062
Closes #2057
Closes #2053
Closes #1998

resolution.summary:
Another try to do the release. As discussed on Slack, we'll stick to the latest cosign 2.x.y release for now.

Follow-up to #2077.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
